10. ANOMALIES

    • Impact: Minimal — process consumes negligible resources
    • Recommendation: Verify if this is intended standby/failover instance or zombie process requiring cleanup
  2. Cohort lifecycle divergence [INFO]
    • Observation: audio_engine + runtime_engine restarted ~59 days after initial deployment cohort
    • Likely explanation: Planned maintenance window or targeted service upgrade for audio/runtime components
    • Impact: None — all processes operating normally

No Critical or High-Severity Anomalies Detected

12. RECOMMENDED ACTIONS

No Immediate Actions Required

The core is operating normally with no critical or high-priority issues requiring immediate intervention. Recommended actions are preventative and can be addressed during regular maintenance cycles.
